siteContent.heroSubtitle: Utility apps and IT solutions for everyday life — from trips and documents to the connected experiences families rely on.
siteContent.about: We build practical mobile utilities and dependable technology platforms that solve real problems in daily life.
siteContent.ecosystemIntro: LORS Nexus is the parent brand for a growing portfolio of apps and ventures. Products ship under their own identity; future child companies can emerge from the nexus as they mature.

missionPillars.title: Everyday utility
missionPillars.body: Apps for trips, documents, media, and the small friction points that add up across your day.

missionPillars.title: Built to solve real problems
missionPillars.body: We focus on practical workflows — not novelty — so each product earns a place in daily routines.

missionPillars.title: Engineered for scale
missionPillars.body: Mobile-first experiences backed by reliable APIs, security-minded design, and production-grade delivery.

itCapabilities.title: Mobile apps
itCapabilities.description: Native and cross-platform clients with polished UX and offline-aware flows.

itCapabilities.title: Cloud & APIs
itCapabilities.description: Scalable backends, REST contracts, and integrations built for real-world load.

itCapabilities.title: Data & security
itCapabilities.description: Thoughtful data models, access control, and privacy-by-design patterns.

itCapabilities.title: Product design
itCapabilities.description: End-to-end product thinking from discovery through shipped experiences.

itCapabilities.title: DevOps
itCapabilities.description: CI/CD, observability, and environments that keep releases predictable.

itCapabilities.title: IT consulting
itCapabilities.description: Architecture reviews, delivery partnerships, and technical due diligence.

featuredProjects.name: RouteMates
featuredProjects.description: Coordinate journeys with companions — shared trips, live location awareness, and mobile-first travel utilities built on a modern API stack.

featuredProjects.name: Family OS
featuredProjects.description: A family-centric utility hub for shared calendars, documents, and household coordination — designed to keep everyone aligned without the clutter.

upcomingProjects.name: TripKit
upcomingProjects.tagline: Plan every leg of the journey
upcomingProjects.description: Trip planning utility — itineraries, checklists, and prep tools for weekends away or cross-country adventures.

upcomingProjects.name: DocVault
upcomingProjects.description: Secure document management for IDs, receipts, and household paperwork — find what you need in seconds.

upcomingProjects.name: TwinCam
upcomingProjects.description: Dual-camera recording for creators and families — capture front and back (or wide and close) in a single synchronized session.

upcomingProjects.name: Nexus Lab
upcomingProjects.description: Experimental ideas across productivity, mobility, and connected living — the next everyday tools we're shaping behind the scenes.
